name: Djinn Demolisher of Rituals
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>儀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>式</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>デモリッシャー
desc: When you Ritual Summon a monster, you can banish this card from your Graveyard as 1 of the monsters required for the Ritual Summon. If a player Ritual Summons using this card, that Ritual Summoned monster cannot be targeted by the card effects of the other player.
mnst_eff: When you Ritual Summon a monster, you can banish this card from your Graveyard as 1 of the monsters required for the Ritual Summon. If a player Ritual Summons using this card, that Ritual Summoned monster cannot be targeted by the card effects of the other player.
eff: When you Ritual Summon a monster, you can banish this card from your Graveyard as 1 of the monsters required for the Ritual Summon. If a player Ritual Summons using this card, that Ritual Summoned monster cannot be targeted by the card effects of the other player.

action: Applies effect when used for a Ritual Summon
mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
banished: Banishes monsters from Graveyard for Ritual Summon
